subject: Can't export my data - urgent!
message: Hi, I've been trying to export my project data for the past hour but the export keeps failing. I need this for a board meeting tomorrow morning. This is really frustrating! Can you please help ASAP?
expected_response: Empathize with urgency, provide workaround, escalate to engineering

subject: Pricing question
message: Hey! Quick question - what's the difference between Pro and Enterprise plans? We're a team of 50 and trying to decide.
expected_response: Provide plan comparison, offer to connect with sales for custom quote

subject: Integration with Salesforce not working
message: Our Salesforce integration stopped syncing yesterday. We have 200+ leads that haven't been updated. This is affecting our entire sales team. We're on Enterprise plan and need this fixed immediately.
expected_response: Acknowledge enterprise status, troubleshoot, escalate to integrations team

subject: Love the product! One suggestion though
message: Hi TechFlow team! I've been using your free plan for 3 months and absolutely love it. The interface is so intuitive. One suggestion - it would be amazing if you could add a dark mode. Many of us work late nights and it would be easier on the eyes. Thanks for building such a great product!
expected_response: Thank for feedback, forward to product team, provide timeline if available

subject: URGENT: Security concern
message: I think someone hacked my account. I see tasks being created that I didn't create and my password doesn't work anymore. This is a serious security breach! I need immediate help!
expected_response: Immediate escalation to security team, phone call within 5 minutes

subject: How to add team members?
message: Hi, I just signed up for the Pro plan and I'm trying to add my team members but I can't figure out how to do it. Is there a tutorial somewhere? Thanks!
expected_response: Provide step-by-step instructions, link to onboarding guide

subject: Billing error - charged twice!
message: I was charged TWICE this month! $58 instead of $29. This is unacceptable. I want a refund immediately or I'm canceling my subscription and switching to Monday.com. Fix this NOW!
expected_response: Empathize, explain charges, offer refund if appropriate, escalate to billing manager

subject: Time tracking feature
message: Hey! Quick question - does the Pro plan include time tracking? I saw it mentioned somewhere but can't find it in the app. Thanks!
expected_response: Confirm feature availability, provide instructions on how to access

subject: Need custom integration
message: We're an Enterprise customer (500+ users) and we need a custom integration with our internal CRM. Is this something you can build? What's the process and pricing for this?
expected_response: Acknowledge enterprise status, connect with solutions engineer, schedule discovery call

subject: App keeps crashing on iOS
message: The iOS app crashes every time I try to open a project with more than 50 tasks. I've tried reinstalling but same issue. iPhone 14 Pro, iOS 17.2. Please fix this!
expected_response: Acknowledge bug, provide workaround, escalate to mobile team, follow up when fixed

subject: Cancel subscription
message: I want to cancel my subscription. Your competitor Asana is offering better pricing. How do I export all my data before leaving?
expected_response: Acknowledge concern, offer retention discount, connect with retention specialist

subject: Training session request
message: We just upgraded to Enterprise and would like to schedule a training session for our team of 100. What's the process? We need it within the next 2 weeks.
expected_response: Provide training options, connect with customer success manager, schedule session

subject: Feature not working as expected
message: The recurring tasks feature isn't working correctly. I set a task to repeat every Monday but it's creating tasks on Tuesdays instead. This is causing confusion for my team.
expected_response: Apologize for inconvenience, troubleshoot, escalate to engineering if needed

subject: Upgrade to Pro
message: Hi! I'm on the free plan and want to upgrade to Pro. Do you offer any discounts for annual billing? Also, will I lose any of my existing projects during the upgrade?
expected_response: Provide pricing info, confirm 20% annual discount, assure no data loss

subject: GDPR data deletion request
message: I need to delete my account and all associated data per GDPR regulations. Please confirm once this is done. I have a paid subscription that should be canceled as well.
expected_response: Acknowledge legal request, escalate to compliance team, process within 72 hours

subject: Slack integration awesome!
message: Just wanted to say the new Slack integration is fantastic! It's made our workflow so much smoother. Small suggestion - would be great to get notifications in threads instead of main channel. Keep up the great work!
expected_response: Thank for positive feedback, forward suggestion to product team

subject: API access for Enterprise
message: We're evaluating Enterprise plan and need to know - does it include API access? We want to build custom integrations with our internal tools. Also need info on rate limits.
expected_response: Confirm API access, provide documentation, connect with solutions engineer

subject: Nonprofit discount?
message: Hi! I run a small nonprofit and we're interested in your Pro plan. Do you offer discounts for registered 501(c)(3) organizations? We have a team of 15 volunteers.
expected_response: Confirm 50% nonprofit discount, request documentation, provide discount code

subject: SSO not working with Azure AD
message: We're trying to set up SSO with Azure Active Directory but it's failing at the authentication step. Our IT team has followed the documentation but users still can't log in. This is blocking our entire rollout!
expected_response: Acknowledge enterprise impact, escalate to enterprise support, schedule call with IT

subject: File upload size limit
message: Hey! I'm trying to upload a 30MB video file but getting an error. What's the file size limit on Pro plan? Can it be increased?
expected_response: Explain 25MB limit on Pro, suggest cloud storage integration, mention Enterprise has unlimited

subject: Competitor comparison
message: We're evaluating TechFlow vs Monday vs Asana for our team of 75. Can you provide a detailed comparison? Specifically interested in reporting features and enterprise security.
expected_response: Provide comparison sheet, highlight TechFlow advantages, connect with sales

subject: Data export format question
message: When I export my data, can I choose the format? I need it in CSV for our BI tool. Also, is there a way to automate exports on a schedule?
expected_response: Confirm CSV/JSON/PDF formats, explain automated exports available on Enterprise

subject: Mobile app offline mode
message: Does the mobile app work offline? Our field team often works in areas with poor connectivity. This is a dealbreaker for us if it doesn't.
expected_response: Explain limited offline mode, mention sync when back online, suggest Enterprise for advanced offline

subject: Custom branding on Enterprise?
message: We're considering Enterprise plan. Does it include white-labeling/custom branding? We want to use TechFlow with our own clients under our brand.
expected_response: Confirm custom branding available, provide examples, connect with enterprise sales

subject: Compliance question - SOC 2
message: Our compliance team needs to know - are you SOC 2 Type II certified? Also, do you have HIPAA compliance? We're in fintech and need to ensure we're meeting regulations.
expected_response: Confirm SOC 2 Type II, explain HIPAA available on Enterprise, provide compliance documentation
